mapper.sql: id, mobile, code, expired_at, used, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO client_auth_codes (mobile, code, expired_at, used, created_at) VALUES (#{mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{code, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expiredAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{used, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO client_auth_codes (mobile, code, expired_at, used, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.code, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.expiredAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.used, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM client_auth_codes WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM client_auth_codes WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
DELETE FROM client_auth_codes WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
